# Fredrik Haugen (haugendesign)

> Fullstack developer. Oslo. Currently building an encrypted app nobody asked me to build.

I build things that hold private thoughts. Right now that's Vitne, an encrypted chat and journal app I've been working on since the start of 2026. Before that I spent four years designing and shipping client websites under my own name.

## Work

- [Vitne](https://haugendesign.no/work/vitne): An end-to-end encrypted app for thinking out loud. Chat, and a journal attached to it. The server holds a blob it can't read. Live at https://vitne.so
- [LocalFlow](https://haugendesign.no/work/localflow): Fully-local voice dictation for macOS. Hold a hotkey anywhere, speak, release. Clean, formatted text appears in whatever app you're using. No cloud, no accounts, no telemetry. Source at https://github.com/FredrikHaugen/whispr-local
- [Mobitech](https://www.mobitech.no): The public site for a Norwegian maritime software company. Design through deployment, plus the CMS their staff edit it with.

## Experience

- [Frontend Developer, Videocation](https://haugendesign.no/experience/videocation)

## Education

- [BSc Civil Engineering, Lund University](https://haugendesign.no/education/bsc-civil-engineering)

- [Product Development, Malmö University](https://haugendesign.no/education/product-development)
- [Media & Communication, Lund University](https://haugendesign.no/education/media-communication)
